hooks.prompt: The tool just wrote or edited a file. Check if the file path contains '/raw/' or '\raw\'. If it does, output EXACTLY this message and nothing else: '[raw/] 새 파일이 추가/수정되었습니다: {file_path}\n/zk-ingest {file_path} 로 처리하시겠습니까?' — replacing {file_path} with the actual file path. If the file path does NOT contain '/raw/' or '\raw\', output nothing.
